news.headline: Fed bids for 3-month bills total $1.3 bln.
Fed bids for 6-month bills total $1.2 bln.
Valoe's financial negotiations progressing, with District Court moving reorganization proceedings suspension decision to 4.3.2025.
CN and Unifor agree on new 4-year collective agreement for 3,300 employees in Canada.
news.summary: In Montreal on December 9, 2024, CN disclosed a recent agreement with Unifor for a four-year collective agreement. The agreement covers around 3,300 CN employees in Canada across various roles including mechanical, clerical, and intermodal functions. CN is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange as CNR and on the New York Stock Exchange as CNI.

news.headline: FDA grants IND approval to Base Therapeutics' NK510 program, powered by GenScript's technology.Congrats Base Therapeutics!
news.summary: In Piscataway, New Jersey, GenScript Biotech, a renowned global biotechnology company specializing in life science, biologics manufacturing, synthetic biology, and cell therapies, celebrated the FDA approval of Base Therapeutics' NK510 program's Investigational New Drug (IND). This significant milestone marks a major achievement for Base Therapeutics and opens new avenues for the development of the NK510 cell therapy.

news.headline: RS honored as one of 2024's Top 100 Inspiring Workplaces worldwide by expert judges, noting its exceptional people-first culture.
news.summary: RS has been honored with a prestigious Global Top 100 Inspiring Workplaces award by a group of expert judges, underscoring its outstanding people-centric workplace and uplifting culture as among the finest in the world. The award recognition was announced in FORT WORTH, Texas, on December 9, 2024. This recognition highlights the company's commitment to fostering a positive and inspiring environment for its employees worldwide.

news.headline: Omnicom to acquire Interpublic Group for $13 billion, may become top ad company; Omnicom secures $7.37 billion in client billings this year.
news.summary: Omnicom Group Inc (NYSE:OMC) has announced its acquisition of Interpublic Group of Companies, Inc (NYSE:IPG) in a stock-for-stock deal. Interpublic shareholders are set to receive 0.344 Omnicom shares for each share of Interpublic common stock. Upon completion, Omnicom shareholders will possess a 60.6% stake in the combined entity, while Interpublic shareholders will hold 39.4%. John Wren is to remain Chairman and CEO of Omnicom, with Phil Angelastro retaining his position as EVP and CFO. Philippe Krakowsky and Daryl Simm will act as Co-Presidents and COOs of Omnicom. Initially reported by the Wall Street Journal, it is vital to note that Omnicom previously made a failed $35 billion bid for Publicis Groupe SA (OTC:PGPEF) (OTC:PUBGY) in 2014. Current data from COMvergence reveals that Omnicom has amassed $7.37 billion in client billings this year, including $4.4 million from retained accounts - marking a lead of over 40% over its nearest competitor. Notably, Omnicom has achieved the highest retention rate in the industry.

news.headline: Equinor completes $2B asset sale in Azerbaijan and Nigeria, receiving $745M for Azerbaijan and $1.2B for Nigeria.
news.summary: Equinor ASA (NYSE:EQNR) has finalized its exit from its upstream ventures in Azerbaijan and Nigeria after over three decades of engagement in both regions. The total consideration from these transactions is estimated to be around $2 billion. For its portfolio in Azerbaijan, Equinor is set to receive $745 million in cash. The deal in Nigeria is valued at up to $1.2 billion, with $710 million being the initial purchase price and the rest in contingent payments. These divestments were announced in 2023. For further details, the complete story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Dow sells 40% stake in US Gulf Coast assets to Macquarie for approx. $2.4B, with potential proceeds reaching $3B.
news.summary: Shares of Dow Inc. (NYSE:DOW) saw an increase in trading on Monday following the announcement of a deal to sell a 40% equity stake in specific U.S. Gulf Coast infrastructure assets to a Macquarie Asset Management fund. The agreement projects an initial cash inflow of around $2.4 billion from the 40% stake sale. However, the total sum could rise to $3.0 billion if Macquarie Asset Management chooses to boost its stake to 49% within six months post-closure. The transaction is scheduled to finalize in the first half of 2025, subject to regulatory approvals and customary procedures.

news.headline: Merck reports mixed data on Keytruda/Lynparza regimen in ovarian cancer trial, meeting primary endpoint of progression-free survival. Keytruda combo showed improvement in patients compared to chemotherapy alone.
news.summary: Merck & Co Inc (NYSE: MRK) shared preliminary results from the Phase 3 KEYLYNK-001 trial on Monday. The trial investigated Keytruda (pembrolizumab) combined with chemotherapy, followed by maintenance with Lynparza (olaparib) and possibly bevacizumab as the initial treatment for BRCA non-mutated advanced epithelial ovarian cancer. The primary goal of progression-free survival was achieved. An independent Data Monitoring Committee's final analysis revealed that the Keytruda plus Lynparza regimen notably boosted progression-free survival over chemotherapy alone for these patients. Though the study did not meet its secondary endpoint, these findings show promise for improving treatment outcomes in this patient population. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Vanguard to launch new Advice & Wealth Management division led by Joanna Rotenberg in Jan 2025, aiming to improve client outcomes.
news.summary: In Valley Forge, Pennsylvania, on December 9, 2024, Vanguard revealed its plan to form a fresh Advice & Wealth Management sector aiming to boost various capabilities to elevate results for its clients. Joanna Rotenberg, a seasoned professional in the industry, is set to join Vanguard in January 2025 to lead this new endeavor.

news.headline: Gallagher to acquire AssuredPartners in $13B deal.

Bitcoin ETFs received $2.5B in inflows and Ethereum ETFs earned $1.2B, contributing to a record-breaking $3.85B inflow last week. Year-to-date inflows reached $41B with $165B in assets under management. Mainstream confidence in Bitcoin and Ethereum remains high.
news.summary: Last week, digital asset investment products experienced a record-breaking weekly inflow of $3.85 billion, surpassing the previous high set just weeks ago. This surge contributed to year-to-date inflows reaching $41 billion and assets under management reaching an all-time peak of $165 billion, as per a report by Coinshares published on Monday. In comparison, during the 2021 cycle highs, inflows were $10.6 billion with assets under management at $83 billion. The report highlighted a rising interest from both institutional and retail investors in digital assets, with Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) maintaining their dominant positions, signaling confidence in these key cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: AMD's shares declined 20% this year. BofA predicts further caution till 2025.
Troutman Pepper promotes 10 attorneys to counsel in various practices nationwide, effective January 1, 2025.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Troutman Pepper revealed the promotion of 10 attorneys to counsel, with the changes set to take effect on January 1, 2025. The promotions cut across various practice areas including Insurance, Energy, Tax, and Finance. The elevated attorneys will work across different offices, demonstrating the firm's commitment to legal excellence and growth.

news.headline: CATW and Meryl Streep honor activist Jaha Dukureh at fundraiser in NYC, annual event to support women and girls' rights.
news.summary: Today, December 9, 2024, the Coalition Against Trafficking in Women (CATW) will hold its yearly fundraising event, titled A Vision for Equality: Celebrating Changemakers for Women and Girls, at Glasshouse on the Park. Ingrid von Ahn is co-chairing the event.

news.headline: Momcozy launches "Joy for All, Love for You" Christmas campaign, celebrating mothers with heartwarming gestures.
news.summary: On December 9th, 2024, Momcozy, a prominent player in the mother and baby care sector, announced its latest Christmas campaign, "Joy for All, Love for You." This initiative aims to spread joy and love during the festive season. The campaign acknowledges the efforts of mothers who dedicate themselves to creating special moments for their families. Momcozy, known for its global presence, is gearing up to make this Christmas season memorable for all.

news.headline: Immersive Gamebox (IGB) expands globally with franchise agreements in Canada and France, marking entry into new markets.
news.summary: London-based Immersive Gamebox (IGB), a prominent provider of immersive group gaming experiences, disclosed significant news on Dec. 9, 2024. The company unveiled two game-changing franchise deals with PowerPlay in Canada and Nikito in France, representing its debut in both markets. This move signifies a strategic expansion for IGB into the Canadian and French gaming sectors.

news.headline: Spaceport and Negosh partner to empower 500+ brands in expanding IP marketing into Roblox and the Metaverse.
news.summary: Negosh, a global partnership and licensing marketplace, is providing more than 500 brands with a chance to enhance their intellectual property marketing approach by entering the realms of Roblox and the Metaverse using Spaceport's platform. The initiative was announced in Boston on December 9, 2024. Spaceport, known for revolutionizing the utilization of branding and IPs, will facilitate this expansion into new territories for the brands associated with Negosh.

news.headline: Jason Salzetti appointed as Chair and CEO of Deloitte Consulting LLP, starting Jan 27, 2025, succeeding Dan Helfrich.
news.summary: In recent news from New York on Dec. 9, 2024, Deloitte US has revealed that Jason Salzetti will be taking on the position of chair and chief executive officer of Deloitte Consulting LLP starting from Jan. 27, 2025. Salzetti will be succeeding Dan Helfrich, who has held the position since 2019. The appointment marks a change in leadership at Deloitte Consulting LLP, with Salzetti bringing his expertise as a visionary leader to the company.

news.headline: InventHelp inventors from Riverdale, Ga. create the KRAKEN board game with a sea-based theme, aiming for fun and social interaction.
news.summary: Three inventors from Riverdale, Georgia, recently unveiled their new board game named KRAKEN in Pittsburgh on December 9, 2024. Their goal was to develop an engaging and creative game revolving around a nautical or sea-based theme. The board game is designed to promote social interaction among players and create a fun and inclusive gaming experience.

news.headline: Luxury equestrian property near Dallas, TX, by Burgher-Ray Ranch Group offers high-tech amenities and sleek design.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, in Dallas, the leading ranch team at Briggs Freeman Sotheby's International Realty, the Burgher-Ray Ranch Group, headed by David Burgher and Harlan Ray, is showcasing an exceptional equestrian property in North Texas. This property stands out as one of the most distinctive in the region.

news.headline: Voxology acquires Integrated Research's testing solutions to enhance customer experience testing, announced on Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Voxology, a CPaaS company, revealed the acquisition of testing capabilities from Integrated Research (IR), a prominent Observability provider. This strategic move includes Voxology obtaining specific testing assets from IR.

news.headline: Robert Half (NYSE: RHI) named a 2024 Fortune Best Workplace for Parents, recognizing US employers for inclusivity.
news.summary: Menlo Park, California - On December 9, 2024, Robert Half, a global talent solutions and business consulting firm listed on NYSE as RHI, was named by Fortune as one of the Best Workplaces for Parents in 2024. This prestigious accolade honors American employers who excel in providing an inclusive and fair work environment for employees who are also parents.

news.headline: Netflix Co-CEO Ted Sarandos to present at UBS Global TMT Conference on Dec 10, 2024, at 1:30pm PT / 4:30pm ET.
news.summary: In Los Gatos, California on December 9, 2024, Netflix, Inc. (Nasdaq: NFLX) disclosed that Ted Sarandos, Co-CEO, is set to speak at the UBS Global TMT Conference on December 10, 2024. The presentation is scheduled for 1:30 p.m. Pacific Time / 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time.

news.headline: DRI International releases 10th Annual Global Risk and Resilience Trends Report, offering insights into disaster recovery and resilience education.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, Disaster Recovery Institute (DRI) International, a prominent nonprofit organization specializing in business continuity and resilience training and certification, released its tenth Annual Global Risk and Resilience Trends Report. This report offers an unbiased analysis of current trends and data related to risk management and resilience on a global scale. This milestone report showcases vital insights and findings regarding the state of preparedness and challenges faced by organizations worldwide.

news.headline: LG partners with will.i.am to revamp LG XBoom's sound & design, launching "XBoom by will.i.am" at CES 2025.
news.summary: In a recent announcement from LG Electronics (LG), it was revealed that will.i.am has collaborated with the company to develop a unique sound and design concept for the upcoming LG xboom 2025 series. These new speakers and earbuds, dubbed "xboom by will.i.am," are set to make their debut at CES 2025. The partnership aims to merge will.i.am's creative vision with LG's innovative technology to create a one-of-a-kind audio experience for consumers. This collaboration signifies a significant move in the tech industry, combining the talents of a renowned musician with a leading electronics manufacturer. The unveiling of "xboom by will.i.am" at CES 2025 reflects a groundbreaking initiative that is poised to captivate audiences with its distinctive identity.

news.headline: G2 integrates with Buy with AWS, simplifying procurement for AWS customers on G2.com, the world's largest B2B marketplace.
news.summary: In Chicago, G2, a leading marketplace for B2B software and services, has introduced the integration of G2.com with Buy with AWS. This new feature, accessible through AWS Marketplace, offers buyers a streamlined experience when researching SaaS products for purchase. Through AWS Marketplace, a digital platform facilitating software and services procurement from AWS Partners, customers can easily discover, acquire, deploy, and oversee various solutions. G2's integration emphasizes efficiency and convenience for buyers leveraging their platform, enhancing the accessibility of SaaS options supported by AWS.

news.headline: 10th StaffDNA® Cure Bowl on Dec. 20, 2024, will feature Jacksonville State and Ohio at Camping World Stadium in Orlando.
news.summary: In Plano, Texas, on December 9, 2024, ESPN Events and the Orlando Sports Foundation disclosed that Jacksonville State and Ohio have been selected to face off in the upcoming 2024 StaffDNA® Cure Bowl. This milestone marks the 10th edition of the college bowl game, scheduled to be held at Camping World Stadium on Friday, December 20.

news.headline: Sakuu's Kavian Platform offers sustainable battery manufacturing, to be available for orders in January 2025.
news.summary: In San Jose, California, Sakuu's Kavian Platform is reaching a significant milestone as it is scheduled to be available for customer orders from January 2025 onwards.

news.headline: Vectorworks report reveals tech trends in event design, AI, VR, and sustainability. Collaboration with Entourage Pro.
news.summary: Vectorworks, Inc. has partnered with Entourage Pro to publish the Insights Tech Report, which sheds light on the current status of technology adoption amidst persistent challenges related to costs, ethics, and education. The report, released on December 9, 2024, from Columbia, Maryland, provides key insights into the state of technology adoption worldwide. This collaboration aims to address the significant issues facing the industry.

news.headline: DP World, Banco del Pacífico, and Mastercard launch exclusive credit card for Ecuador's logistics sector, aimed at supporting executives and corporate clients. Card tailored for use in DP World's deepwater port in Posorja, connecting Ecuador with key international markets.
news.summary: In Guayaquil, Ecuador, DP World, a prominent player in logistics and supply chain services, has collaborated with Banco del Pacífico and Mastercard to introduce the DP World Business Credit Card. Aimed at aiding executives and corporate customers in the logistics and ports and terminals industries, this credit card is tailored to meet their needs. With a notable presence in Ecuador, DP World operates a vital deepwater port in Posorja, facilitating essential connections for the country with major global markets.

news.headline: Philip Wolf joins Latham & Watkins in New York as M&A partner, specializing in private equity. Dec. 9, 2024.
news.summary: Experienced in both in-house and private practice, Philip Wolf has joined Latham & Watkins LLP in New York as a partner in the Mergers & Acquisitions team. With a wealth of knowledge in complex private equity transactions, his addition further strengthens the firm's capabilities. The announcement was made on December 9, 2024.

news.headline: Macally introduces iPad case with keyboard in California. Features backlit keys, trackpad, adjustable stand. Priced at $129.99.
news.summary: In Rancho Cucamonga, California, a new product has been launched by Macally. It is an iPad case equipped with a keyboard featuring backlit keys, a trackpad, and an adjustable stand. Priced at $129.99, this device is designed to enhance productivity and convenience for users.

news.headline: RBC Global Asset Management (U.S.) named to P&I's Best Places to Work list for 2nd year in 2024.
news.summary: In December 9, 2024, RBC Global Asset Management (U.S.) received distinction as a top workplace in the money management sector for 2024, maintaining its position for a second consecutive year. This recognition was conferred by Pensions & Investments, highlighting the company's commitment to providing an exceptional work environment within the industry. Pensions & Investments, through its yearly survey initiative, aims to pinpoint and acknowledge superior workplaces, with RBC Global Asset Management (U.S.) securing its position as an esteemed organization within the financial sphere.

news.headline: NY Fed: Respondents expect higher interest rates on savings accounts next year.
NY Fed: Survey respondents see declining risk of missing debt payment.
NY Fed: November current household financial situation perceptions are steady.
UK's Chancellor Reeves: Talks with the EU on resetting ties will begin in 2025.
NY Fed: US 5-year inflation expectations rose to 2.9% in November vs. 2.8%.
NY Fed: Survey respondents see weaker year-ahead gas, rent and food costs.
NY Fed: Respondents sharply cut expectations of future government borrowing levels.
NY Fed: Respondents are expecting better year-ahead financial situation at highest level since February 2020.
VEON initiates share buyback program with up to USD 30 million for American Depositary Shares in first phase.
news.summary: On December 9, 2024, VEON Ltd. (Nasdaq: VEON), a worldwide digital operator, has disclosed the initiation of the initial stage of its previously declared share repurchase initiative focusing on the Company’s American Depositary Shares (“ADS”). The authorized amount for this initial buyback phase is up to USD 30 million, as confirmed by the Board of Directors of VEON.

news.headline: US 1-year inflation expectations rose to 3% in November after 2.9%.
NY Fed: November 3-year ahead expected inflation at 2.6% vs 2.5% in October.
Solar Landscape secures $847 million in financing for 2024, will deploy 200+ rooftop solar installations, powering 50,000+ households.
news.summary: In Asbury Park, NJ, Solar Landscape, a prominent commercial and industrial rooftop solar developer, disclosed today that it has successfully obtained $847 million in project investment and financing for the year 2024. This transactional value, which marks the company's most substantial amount secured in a single year to date, will facilitate the deployment of over 200 commercial rooftop solar systems nationwide. These installations are projected to generate ample energy to power in excess of 50,000 households. Additionally, in 2024, Solar Landscape announced its plans to...
